title: Documents
description: One uploaded health document — a lab-report text, a wearable CSV export, a doctor's-note text, or a medication label — that the records/analyst reads and extracts structured data from. The raw/extracted source text is stored inline in `content` (this app keeps text inline rather than a separate blob file); binary uploads arrive as text or are summarised on the client.

kind.description: the document kind — 'lab_pdf' | 'wearable_csv' | 'note_text' | 'med_label' | 'other'; the analyst may correct a guessed kind

filename.description: the original filename the user uploaded

content.description: the raw or extracted text of the document the analyst parses (kept inline; never rendered as HTML — sanitised before display)

status.description: 'pending' while queued, 'analyzing' while the analyst runs, 'analyzed' when done, 'error' on failure — set by the analyst, not the user

summary.description: markdown summary of what the analyst found and wrote (empty while pending)

error.description: the failure reason when status is 'error'

extractions.description: the domain rows the analyst derived from this document

notes.description: cited knowledge notes derived from this document
